features: 1.7 Litre Electric Plastic kettle for Hot Water Boiling with Automatic Shut off and Boil-Dry Protection
Made from high-quality Materials With 2200 watts of Boiling power.
Cord-free Kettle Jar With a detached base for easy day-to-day use. Indicator light in the on/off switch

We provide a 3-year Manufacture Guarantee, Please feel free to contact us regarding any use-related issue.
description: Product Description Key Features paul russells Electric Plastic Kettle - 1.7 Litre, 2200-Watts fast Boil power Introducing the 1.7-liter Paul Russells Electric Plastic Kettle for effortless hot water boiling. This well-designed appliance operates at 2200 watts, ensuring rapid boiling while incorporating safety features such as automatic shut-off and boil-dry protection to prevent overheating. Made from high-quality materials, it features a cord-free design with a detachable base for added convenience. The kettle is equipped with an indicator light for user convenience and a large manual opening for easy cleaning.
